nodes.label: HiseEvent (Note-On)
nodes.description: Note-on event provides the event ID for storage association

nodes.label: Store Event ID
nodes.description: Captures event ID per voice on note-on and writes current value

nodes.label: Write to Event Storage
nodes.description: Writes value to AdditionalEventStorage[eventId][slotIndex] for all active voices

nodes.label: SlotIndex
nodes.description: Selects which data slot (0-15) to write

nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: The value to store (nominally 0..1, but any double accepted)
